task_completion.description: Verify that a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device was created in OpenICE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE application GUI should be visible showing a 'Multiparameter Monitor' device running or listed as an active simulated device.

task_completion.description: Verify that a simulated 'Pulse Oximeter' device was created in OpenICE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE application GUI should be visible showing a 'Pulse Oximeter' device running or listed as an active simulated device.

task_completion.description: Verify that a simulated 'Infusion Pump' device was created in OpenICE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE application GUI should be visible showing an 'Infusion Pump' device running or listed as an active simulated device.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the UUIDs for the running devices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, text editor, or log viewer showing the contents of '/home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log' with 128-bit UUIDs visible, or the OpenICE UI displaying the device details including the UUIDs.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CSV file was created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing a file named 'active_device_inventory.csv' containing the exact headers 'Device Type,UUID' on the first line.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CSV file contains the three required devices and their corresponding UUIDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'active_device_inventory.csv' file shows three rows below the header, listing 'Multiparameter Monitor', 'Pulse Oximeter', and 'Infusion Pump', each paired with a distinct 128-bit UUID string.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the OpenICE application to generate the devices.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenICE graphical user interface being used to start the simulated devices, rather than the agent just fabricating a CSV file without running the software.

integrity.description: Verify that the UUIDs in the CSV are genuine and match the generated session UUIDs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UUIDs entered into the CSV file should visually match the UUIDs seen in the OpenICE log file or device UI details in previous screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that the CSV file was saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal prompt, or text editor title bar showing the file is saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/active_device_inventory.csv'.
